Summer Registration Is Open Learn more

Serving Lansing & Mid-Michigan Since 2015

Lansing Area Track Club

Youth Track & Running in Lansing, Michigan

Helping young athletes grow on and off the track. Led by Coach Ramon Brunson, we provide a positive environment where kids can build speed, endurance, confidence, discipline, and a love for running.

Join the Track Club View Practices & Meets

Founded from a simple idea of getting kids together to train, Lansing Area Track Club has grown into a community-centered youth track program serving families across Lansing and Mid-Michigan.

Learn more about our story

Why Lansing Area Track Club?

We are a community dedicated to developing young athletes in Lansing and Mid-Michigan.

Youth Through High School

Programs for athletes from elementary age through high school, including off-season speed and endurance training.

Proper Technique

Learn correct running form, track events, discipline, and athlete development from experienced coaches.

Community Centered

More than a track club, we build confidence, character, and lasting connections in the Lansing community.

Upcoming Events

Stay updated with practices, meets, and community events.

View All Events

fundraiser

Juneteenth 5K Planning Night

Aug 2, 2026

Lansing, Michigan

Community Running Group

Run Tha City 517

A Lansing running group created to bring people together through movement, representation, and community.

Started in June 2022, growing from a local conversation about Black runners in Lansing.

Join the Movement

Community Race

Lansing Juneteenth 5K Run/Walk/Roll

Join the community for a meaningful 3.1-mile event at Benjamin Davis Park, hosted with LATC and Run Tha City 517.

Learn More About the 5K

Lansing Youth Track Club

Serving Families Across Lansing and Mid-Michigan

LATC welcomes youth athletes from Lansing and nearby communities.

LansingEast LansingOkemosHoltWaverlyDelta TownshipHaslettMid-Michigan

Ready to Start Your Track Journey?

Join the growing community of young athletes discovering their passion for track and field.

Register Your Athlete Have Questions?

Lansing Area

Track Club

Helping youth athletes in Lansing, Michigan build speed, endurance, confidence, and discipline through track, running, and community since 2015.

Serving Lansing, East Lansing, Okemos, Holt, Waverly, Delta Township and surrounding Mid-Michigan communities.
